narration: A prefix sum stores the running total from the beginning up to each position.
If we want the sum from index 1 to 3, we can subtract the total before index 1 from the total at index 3.

predictionPrompt.prompt: If left is 0, what should happen?

choices.label: Use prefix[right] directly
choices.feedback: Correct. There is nothing on the left side to subtract away.

choices.label: Always subtract prefix[left - 1] anyway
choices.feedback: Not this one. When left is 0, there is no earlier prefix index.

narration: This saves time because we do setup once, then later questions reuse the saved totals.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why is prefix-sum setup worth it when many questions are coming?
